name: periscope-plugins
description: Plugins for the Periscope financial-data platform: the Periscope MCP connector and financial data-quality tooling for Claude Code.

plugins.name: periscope
plugins.description: Equity research over SEC filings, powered by the Periscope MCP. Tools pull company financials, statements, and multi-period trends live from EDGAR — plus filing text and semantic search — and support pipeline operations and watchlists. Identify any company by ticker or CIK.
